mining.name: Mining
mining.description: Extract ores and minerals from rock veins.

logging.name: Logging
logging.description: Fell trees and collect valuable lumber.

fishing.name: Fishing
fishing.description: Catch fish from rivers, lakes, and the sea.

smelting.name: Smelting
smelting.description: Smelt raw ores into refined metal bars.

milling.name: Milling
milling.description: Mill raw logs into usable planks.

cooking.name: Cooking
cooking.description: Cook raw fish into nourishing meals.
